name: Reginald, Robur, Azuri, and Cassie College AU | Block Tales Demo 5
description:
Back at it again gang!!!

This one is a college au inspired by @yumiblox on Twitter.

Cassie update is now live, scenario 3 and 4 are 1 and 2 but with Cassie involved.

Us when Cassie update:

Also, @yumiblox's art is their study uniform and @Kaden_dnki's art is their casual clothes.

Credits to @yumiblox on Twitter for inspiration.

Post here:

Cassie studies in 'Etiquette and Royalty'.

Credits to @Kaden_dnki on Twitter for the thumbnail (not meant to be college looking but I thought it looked good and fitting for the bot).

Post here:

P.S. The wings in @Yumiblox’s art are and will not be present in the character descriptions. Sorry to the bird enjoyers on this website.
